title: The Long Game is born
description: Twelve franchises. One commissioner. Twenty-five years of bragging rights to be decided. Nobody knew what they were getting into.

title: Jamie completes the four-year dynasty
description: Four championships in the league's first four seasons. An opening act that may never be matched. The standard was set before most franchises had found their footing.

title: Keeper format suspended
description: One season without keepers. Teams return to a pure draft format. The reason has been lost to history.

title: Keeper format returns
description: The league reinstates keepers. Some teams have spent the year reconsidering their rosters. Others never stopped planning.

title: Dominic begins his championship run
description: Dominic wins his first title in just his third season as steward. The F03 franchise — silent under Byron — suddenly has a voice.

title: BV: one season and gone
description: The F07 franchise changes hands for the first time since Jamie's dynasty. BV manages for exactly one season before passing to Robby.

title: A season lost to incomplete data
description: The 2011 draft records are incomplete. The season happened. The keepers did not. The champion is recorded. The rest remains a gap in the archive.

title: Nick falls short — again
description: Eleven seasons. Ten playoff appearances. The F04 franchise reaches the podium once more and comes away empty. The title feels further away than ever.

title: Bryan Kearney takes over F04
description: After Nick's decade-plus run, the franchise changes hands for the fourth time. Bryan inherits a playoff pedigree and a championship drought.

title: Kearney ends the franchise drought
description: Twenty-one seasons. Four different stewards. The F04 franchise finally lifts the trophy. Bryan Kearney does what Dale, Joe, and Nick could not.

title: Dominic wins championship number five
description: Five titles across 19 seasons as the F03 steward. The most decorated manager in league history adds another chapter.
